title: Certified ceilings for a finitary Mertens-type extremal problem (EinsteinArena PNT benchmark)
description: A short computer-assisted note and its full verification package: two machine-verified weak-duality upper bounds, S*(4800) <= 0.9963688817172828744325041 and S*(12000) <= 0.9974876103072528157057480, for a finitary Mertens-type extremal problem from the EinsteinArena PNT benchmark. Each bound is an exact dyadic dual y = Y/2^48 whose weak-duality value B(y) is regenerated in exact integer arithmetic with an integer residual pass and outward-rounded mpmath interval log enclosures (dual-precision 500/800-bit, plus a rational-atanh audit); no unenclosed floating-point quantity enters the certified path. An independent skeptic harness re-verifies both certificates (hash pinning, full residual pass, primal-vs-bound checks). A one-command `make verify` reproduces both 25-digit ceilings from the shipped integer duals using only numpy and mpmath. The repository includes the note, both certificates, both integer duals, the solver/certifier/skeptic scripts, and the log-audit summaries.
